purpose: Fetch cloud cost and billing data from AWS or Azure for any time range and service filter.
description: Queries AWS Cost Explorer or Azure Cost Management. Use for: what did EC2 cost last month, how much did we spend on S3, Azure costs for last 6 months, compare EC2 vs Lambda costs, daily cost breakdown, YTD spend by service. Supports MONTHLY/DAILY granularity, service/region filtering, account scoping. Multi-step for multiple services or time periods.
capabilities: retrieve AWS cost data from Cost Explorer for any time period
retrieve Azure cost data from Cost Management API
filter costs by service, region, account-id, profile, and tag
support MONTHLY, DAILY, and HOURLY cost granularity breakdowns
compare costs across multiple services or periods via multi-step execution
context_descriptions: billing time range — start and end dates for cost query with monthly boundary alignment
service filter — specific AWS or Azure service to scope the cost query
cost metric — AmortizedCost, UnblendedCost, BlendedCost for AWS; ActualCost, AmortizedCost for Azure
account scope — AWS profile or Azure subscription-name to target
